claims.summary: Dynamic-noise and viscous-rho helpers exist as source-prepared review surfaces but are not wired into live ESN::step.
The reported calculate_dynamic_noise(current_gradient=0.50, target_pressure=0.35) point should preserve bounded room rather than collapse to the floor.
The volatile-entropy boundary for calculate_viscous_rho_target should not silently jump rho at the exact threshold.
Using the source-prepared dynamic noise/rho values in live ESN behavior would alter exploration/rho authority.
